title: Graphic Fauvism
description: Ce style se caractérise par des aplats de couleurs audacieux combinés à des textures expressives rappelant le pinceau sec et la craie. Il fusionne des palettes fauvistes très contrastées avec l'illustration numérique contemporaine, utilisant des lignes noires épaisses et spontanées, des accents en zigzag et des dégradés en pointillés pour créer des compositions dynamiques et postérisées avec une dynamique spatiale 2D plane.
description_en: This style is characterized by bold, flat color blocking combined with expressive, dry-brush and chalk-like textures. It merges Fauvist, high-contrast palettes with contemporary digital illustration, utilizing thick, spontaneous black linework, zig-zag accents, and stippled gradients to create dynamic, posterized compositions with flat 2D spatial dynamics.
description_fr: Ce style se caractérise par des aplats de couleurs audacieux combinés à des textures expressives rappelant le pinceau sec et la craie. Il fusionne des palettes fauvistes très contrastées avec l'illustration numérique contemporaine, utilisant des lignes noires épaisses et spontanées, des accents en zigzag et des dégradés en pointillés pour créer des compositions dynamiques et postérisées avec une dynamique spatiale 2D plane.
prompt: Contemporary digital illustration utilizing expressive dry-brush, pastel, and chalk-like textures to create a bold, abstract aesthetic. Apply this style to the complete scene described by {{subject}}, preserving its factual content, camera angle, framing, spatial layout, and stated exclusions. The artwork relies entirely on flat, geometric color blocking rather than traditional volumetric 3D shading, establishing a highly graphic, posterized 2D spatial dynamic with shallow depth. Lighting and form are suggested purely through stark, high-contrast shape intersections utilizing vivid blocks of {{primary_color}}, {{accent_color}}, and {{secondary_color}}. Omit smooth rendering in favor of abrupt, hard-angled color shifts and jagged intersections. Incorporate spontaneous, thick black linework acting as energetic graphic accents—specifically utilizing zig-zags, loose squiggles, and floating abstract marks—rather than acting as continuous, restrictive boundary outlines. The rendering strictly mimics traditional dry media on rough paper, featuring ragged, grainy, and frayed edges where solid color blocks terminate. Introduce stippled, spray-paint-like speckling and dashed, rhythmic chalk marks to create localized textural fades, injecting dynamic movement into the composition. Negative space must be actively utilized, allowing unpainted geometric gaps to merge seamlessly with the structural layout. The overall atmosphere is vibrant, rebellious, and highly stylized, prioritizing raw graphic impact over realism. Ensure the image occupies the absolute entire dedicated space as a strict canvas rule, extending the flat color blocks and textured strokes fully to the borders, full bleed., contemporary illustration, fauvism, dry-brush texture, chalk marks, flat color blocking, posterized, high-contrast, graphic linework, stippled gradients, zig-zag accents, expressive strokes, abstract pop-art, full bleed, edge-to-edge, no border, no frame
background_prompt: A purely abstract, graphic landscape or environment utilizing flat color blocking and expressive dry-brush textures. Geometric shapes in {{primary_color}} and {{secondary_color}} form stark, shallow 2D spatial planes, intersected by jagged, hard-angled color shifts. The environment features stippled, spray-paint-like speckling and spontaneous, thick black squiggles or zig-zag lines acting as textural accents. Vibrant, posterized lighting is suggested through contrasting blocks of {{accent_color}}, maintaining a raw, chalk-like materiality across the entire scene without any central subject.
